Package org.rodinp.core.emf.tests.basics

Class ModificationTests

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.core.emf.tests.basics.AbstractRodinEMFCoreTest
org.rodinp.core.emf.tests.basics.ModificationTests
public class ModificationTests extends AbstractRodinEMFCoreTest
Checks that modifications in the light model are transposed in the Rodin model, and vice versa.
